observed_signal: D2 strongly improves TP transfer and partly improves TW, consistent with a bulk-to-probe/QOI projection issue plus remaining wall physics.
Separating TP from TW barely changes total transfer RMSE versus one global offset, but it sharpens the physical queue: TP projection first, TW wall response second.
D3/D4 improve beyond D2, so D2 alone is not the final physics; it is the first projection layer before wall/segment source placement.

claim_boundary: D2 is evidence for study priority, not a released correction
